instruction: <RETAIL>You are Yusuf Rossi in 19122. You want to know how many tshirt options are available in the online store right now. You want to also return the cleaner, headphone, and smart watch.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: how many tshirt options are available in the online store right now
dialogue_state.initial_query: number of tshirt options available online now

hints.hint: This request is for Yusuf Rossi

I also want to return the cleaner
